description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND TBS broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is unauthorized for TBS MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = false
AND the feed level tbsAuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the user views a TBS Postseason game tile
steps.result: THEN the MVPD pill displays in the lower left corner of the game tile
